questions.clue: To protect an ancestral cemetery, in 1910 attorney Lyda Conley became the 3rd woman & 1st Native American to argue a case here
questions.answer: the Supreme Court (of the United States)

final.clue: The Vietnam War crypt at this memorial has been empty since the remains once there were identified & moved to St. Louis
final.answer: the Tomb of the Unknown Soldier
